description.value: The shield leads and everything else follows.

system.benefits:
If you move at least 20 feet straight toward a target before making a shield bash on the same turn, the target must make a [[/save type=fortitude]] (opposed by your Strength + Melee Combat):

  • Margin 1: Target is knocked Prone and pushed 10 feet directly away from you.
  • Margin 2: Target is knocked Prone, pushed 10 feet, and gains the Stunned [Hindered] condition until the end of their next turn.
